channel.title: Tech Library
channel.description: Free tech tutorials, tools, lexicon, and digital survival guides

item.title: Platform Engineering — Tech Library
item.description: Platform engineering — internal developer platforms, Backstage, and golden paths.

item.title: Observability & Telemetry — Tech Library
item.description: Observability — logs, metrics, traces, OpenTelemetry, and alerting.

item.title: NoSQL Databases Overview — Tech Library
item.description: NoSQL — document, key-value, wide-column, graph databases and use cases.

item.title: Microfrontends — Tech Library
item.description: Microfrontends — compose frontends from independent teams, frameworks, and deployments.

item.title: Load & Performance Testing — Tech Library
item.description: Performance testing — load, stress, spike, soak tests, and tooling.

item.title: Feature Flags & A/B Testing — Tech Library
item.description: Feature flags, canary releases, A/B testing, and experimentation.

item.title: Data Engineering & ETL — Tech Library
item.description: Data engineering — ETL/ELT, pipelines, data warehousing, and orchestration.

item.title: Cryptography Fundamentals — Tech Library
item.description: Cryptography — symmetric, asymmetric, hashing, digital signatures, and PKI.

item.title: Tech Library — Tutorials, Tools, Lexicon & Resources
item.description: Tutorials, tech lexicon, emergency survival resources, free media alternatives, and curated resources — all free, all organized.

item.title: Serverless & Event-Driven — Tech Library
item.description: Serverless architecture -- Lambda, event-driven patterns, and best practices.

item.title: Rust Programming — Tech Library
item.description: Systems programming with Rust -- ownership, borrowing, lifetimes, and concurrency.

item.title: REST API Design Patterns — Tech Library
item.description: REST API patterns -- HATEOAS, pagination, filtering, error handling.

item.title: Python Advanced — Tech Library
item.description: Advanced Python -- decorators, generators, context managers, async, and metaprogramming.

item.title: Microservices Architecture — Tech Library
item.description: Microservices -- design, communication, data management, and deployment.

item.title: GraphQL in Practice — Tech Library
item.description: GraphQL -- schema design, resolvers, subscriptions, and performance.

item.title: Google Cloud Platform — Tech Library
item.description: Google Cloud -- Compute Engine, GKE, Cloud Storage, BigQuery, and IAM.

item.title: Go Programming — Tech Library
item.description: Go language -- concurrency, interfaces, tooling, and web development.

item.title: Event-Driven Architecture — Tech Library
item.description: Event-driven design -- events, brokers, CQRS, and event sourcing.

item.title: Dockerfile Best Practices — Tech Library
item.description: Build efficient Docker images -- multi-stage, caching, security, and size optimization.

item.title: Domain-Driven Design — Tech Library
item.description: DDD -- ubiquitous language, bounded context, aggregates, and tactical patterns.

item.title: Cloud Networking & VPC — Tech Library
item.description: Cloud networking -- VPC design, peering, VPN, Direct Connect, and CDN.

item.title: Cloud Cost Optimization — Tech Library
item.description: Reduce cloud costs -- right-sizing, reserved instances, spot instances, and FinOps.

item.title: Bash & Shell Scripting — Tech Library
item.description: Advanced shell scripting -- POSIX, Zsh, Fish, and shell automation patterns.

item.title: AWS S3 & Storage — Tech Library
item.description: Deep dive into S3 -- storage classes, security, lifecycle, and performance.

item.title: Azure Fundamentals — Tech Library
item.description: Microsoft Azure -- VMs, storage, networking, Entra ID, and core services.

item.title: AWS Fundamentals — Tech Library
item.description: Amazon Web Services -- EC2, S3, VPC, IAM, Lambda, and core services.

item.title: AWS EC2 & Compute — Tech Library
item.description: Deep dive into AWS EC2 -- instance types, storage, networking, and optimization.

item.title: Zig Systems Programming — Tech Library
item.description: Modern systems programming — manual memory management, comptime, and C interop.

item.title: WSL 2 — Tech Library
item.description: Windows Subsystem for Linux 2 — full Linux kernel, VS Code integration, and Docker.

item.title: Zero Trust Architecture — Tech Library
item.description: Security model: never trust, always verify — micro-segmentation, IAM, and continuous monitoring.

item.title: Wireless Networking — Tech Library
item.description: Wireless networks — WiFi 6/7, mesh, security, and spectrum management.

item.title: Windows Security — Tech Library
item.description: Windows security — Defender, BitLocker, Windows Hello, and attack surface reduction.

item.title: Windows Server — Tech Library
item.description: Windows Server — roles, IIS, Hyper-V, Windows Admin Center, and Nano Server.

item.title: Windows Registry — Tech Library
item.description: Windows Registry — hives, keys, values, editing, backup, and forensic analysis.

item.title: Windows Networking — Tech Library
item.description: Windows networking — DNS, DHCP, RRAS, NLB, and monitoring tools.

item.title: Windows Performance & Troubleshooting — Tech Library
item.description: Windows performance tuning, diagnostics, and recovery tools.

item.title: Windows Intune & Endpoint Manager — Tech Library
item.description: Cloud device management -- Microsoft Intune, Autopilot, compliance.

item.title: Windows Deployment (MDT/SCCM) — Tech Library
item.description: Deploy Windows at scale -- MDT, SCCM, imaging, PXE boot.

item.title: Wi-Fi Penetration Testing — Tech Library
item.description: Assess wireless security — WPA2/WPA3 cracking, evil twin, and deauthentication attacks.

item.title: Windows Automation (PowerShell DSC) — Tech Library
item.description: Windows automation -- PowerShell remoting, DSC, scheduled tasks.

item.title: WebAssembly — Tech Library
item.description: High-performance browser code -- Wasm, WASI, Emscripten, and tooling.

item.title: WebSockets & SSE — Tech Library
item.description: Real-time web -- WebSockets, Server-Sent Events, WebRTC data channels.

item.title: Web Performance Optimization — Tech Library
item.description: Core Web Vitals, lazy loading, caching, CDN, and performance budgets.

item.title: Web Scraping — Tech Library
item.description: Web scraping -- HTTP requests, HTML parsing, anti-bot bypass.

item.title: Wayland vs X11 — Tech Library
item.description: Display servers -- Wayland architecture, X11 comparison, migration.

item.title: Web Application Firewall — Tech Library
item.description: WAF configuration — ModSecurity, Cloudflare WAF, rate limiting, and rule tuning.

item.title: Web Auth (OAuth, JWT, SAML) — Tech Library
item.description: Web authentication -- OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect, JWT, SAML, WebAuthn.

item.title: VPNs & Tunneling — Tech Library
item.description: Virtual Private Networks — WireGuard, OpenVPN, IPsec, and secure site-to-site connections.

item.title: Vue.js & Nuxt.js — Tech Library
item.description: Progressive framework Vue.js with Nuxt.js — composition API, Pinia, SSR.

item.title: Video Editing — Tech Library
item.description: Video editing — DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro, color grading, and motion graphics.
